stages.name: inbox
stages.description: Captured but not yet clarified. Default state for new tasks.

stages.name: next
stages.description: Clarified and ready to work on when capacity allows.

stages.name: waiting
stages.description: Blocked on someone else; not actively progressing.

stages.name: someday
stages.description: Maybe one day. Not committed; revisited at weekly review.

stages.name: dropped
stages.description: Decided not to do. Kept for record.
